title: MikroTik XQ+CM0000-XS+ QSFP28/QSFP+ adapter
description: The XQ+CM0000-XS+ adapter is the perfect accessory for CR504, CRS518, CRS510 switches and other devices with QSFP28 (100Gbps) or QSFP+ (40Gbps) ports. Thanks to this adapter, lower speed modules can be used in higher speed slots . If you do not currently use higher speeds, you can save on energy consumption, but mainly on the purchase price of SFP modules
